prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Gauging & GD&T basics, part of the Assembly & Fabrication scope. The observed field condition is: go/no-go misread (go doesn't go = undersize... reasoning item). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: ASME Y14.5 (basic), gauge instructions. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Gauging & GD&T basics (production floor)
